hero.title: Our Product Portfolio
hero.subtitle: Innovative Solutions Built for the Future
hero.description: Discover our range of cutting-edge products designed to solve real-world problems and drive digital transformation across industries.

products.name: TechRover CRM
products.description: Comprehensive customer relationship management platform designed for growing businesses with advanced automation and analytics.
products.longDescription: TechRover CRM is a complete customer relationship management solution that helps businesses manage their sales pipeline, customer interactions, and marketing campaigns. Built with modern technologies, it offers real-time analytics, automated workflows, and seamless integrations.

testimonials.quote: TechRover CRM transformed our sales process completely. We've seen a 40% increase in conversions.
testimonials.author: Rajesh Kumar

products.name: AI Chatbot Builder
products.description: No-code AI chatbot builder that allows businesses to create intelligent conversational agents without programming knowledge.
products.longDescription: Our AI Chatbot Builder empowers businesses to create sophisticated chatbots using natural language processing and machine learning. With drag-and-drop interface and pre-built templates, anyone can build powerful conversational AI.

testimonials.quote: The AI chatbot handles 85% of our customer queries automatically. Incredible ROI!
testimonials.author: Priya Sharma

products.name: Inventory Pro
products.description: Advanced inventory management system with real-time tracking, automated reordering, and comprehensive reporting for businesses.
products.longDescription: Inventory Pro is a comprehensive inventory management solution that helps businesses track stock levels, manage suppliers, automate reordering, and generate detailed reports. Perfect for retail, manufacturing, and distribution companies.

testimonials.quote: Inventory Pro reduced our stockouts by 60% and improved our cash flow significantly.
testimonials.author: Amit Patel

products.name: Project Hub
products.description: Collaborative project management platform with task tracking, team communication, and advanced reporting capabilities.
products.longDescription: Project Hub is designed for modern teams who need to collaborate effectively on complex projects. With intuitive task management, real-time communication, and powerful analytics, teams can deliver projects on time and within budget.

testimonials.quote: Project Hub helped us deliver projects 30% faster with better team coordination.
testimonials.author: Sarah Johnson

products.name: E-commerce Suite
products.description: Complete e-commerce platform with advanced features for online stores, including payment processing and inventory management.
products.longDescription: Our E-commerce Suite provides everything needed to run a successful online store. From product catalog management to payment processing and order fulfillment, it's a complete solution for businesses of all sizes.

testimonials.quote: Our online sales increased by 250% after switching to TechRover's E-commerce Suite.
testimonials.author: Vikash Singh

products.name: Learning Management System
products.description: Comprehensive LMS for educational institutions and corporate training with course management and student tracking.
products.longDescription: Our Learning Management System is designed for educational institutions and corporate training programs. It provides comprehensive tools for course creation, student management, assessments, and progress tracking.

testimonials.quote: The LMS increased our student engagement rate to 90%. Excellent platform for online education.
testimonials.author: Dr. Meera Gupta
